Gerot Kastane  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 18th, 2020 by Genalo
Updated April 19th, 2020

  • This mob spawns at +797,+670.
  • He is on Truespirit faction.
  • Mob sees through invisibility: Yes
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2022-01-28 21:22:27.

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2022-01-30 08:13:14
Items Given:
Head of the Valiant
Note to Marl

Known Habitats:
  Paineel
Factions Decreased:
  Truespirit
Quests:
  Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Report a correction

Post Comment
Easy key to Paineel for SK shortcut
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2020 at 7:53 AM Rating: Excellent
Vedarian
Guru
186 posts
You need to be a subscriber.

Create an evil Erudite like necro or SK. Choose Paineel as your home but don't unclick tutorial. Get sent to Gloomingdeep. Once you are in the tutorial, immediately tell Arias "I am ready to leave". This takes you to POK.

Give the key to the person who needs it since it is only Lore. At least on FV server.
▲ Page top
Gerot

Gerot Kastane is Truespirit faction, like most of the NPCs in the SK epic.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2016 at 12:33 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
nytmare wrote:
Gerot Kastane is Truespirit faction, like most of the NPCs in the SK epic.



Updated the notes, thanks.
▲ Page top
Gerot Kastane
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2005 at 2:02 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1609114694105
118 posts
To get into Paineel you need a key. Kill some 1k kobalds in the Warrens for faction. Hail the skeleton located in the newbie area under Duriek Bloodpool for a key. Once you travel down the elevator, and down the winding stairs, you will come into a courtyard. The first thing you see is a small pool and pillars resembeling Stone Henge. Gerot Kastane can be located between the two nearest pillars on your left. at Loc 800, 670. He may not always be up, and you can not see him from the doorway. I have the Seal of Kastane from Marl. Gerot conns apprehensively to me, and will not take the seal. I have NOT handed in the dusty tomb to Duriek Bloodpool yet. This may have an affect on faction with Truespirit. I tried illusion Erudite but had no effect. Will edit this post when I have more info.

*Edited* 12-26-05
I finished the turn in of the Dusty Tomb to Duriek Bloodpool in Paineel. Even after the turn in, Gerot would still not take the Seal of Kastane. Silly me, fealing like a newbie, I handed Gerot the seal, clicked hide, clicked give, and it worked. don't know why I didn't think of this before. Good luck to everyone on this Over rated quest.

Edited, Mon Dec 26 05:24:53 2005
▲ Page top
Gerot Kastane
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2007 at 7:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791412167
46 posts
Quote:
Silly me, fealing like a newbie, I handed Gerot the seal, clicked hide, clicked give, and it worked.


This is the wierdest thing.. Gerot wouldnt take the seal and I was about to petition when I read this post and decided to try the hide and give thing and it WORKED! I just had to try to hide repeatably until he conned indifferent.

Gerot Kastane

▲ Page top
Gerot's Loc
QuoteReply
# Dec 25 2003 at 8:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248788225
51 posts
Gerot is located past the elevator and down the steps in the courtyard with the eight or so round supports with a pool in the middle. He is between two of the supports.

▲ Page top
RE: Marl Kastane ? loc?
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2004 at 12:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592258732767
66 posts
Marl is in Kera Isle, in the town area. A tiny hut that will be empty if he's not up; it will be the only empty hut. It's in the back left when you enter the town.
▲ Page top
RE: Marl Kastane ? loc?
QuoteReply
# Feb 01 2003 at 4:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771083702
4 posts
Neither of the two are up all the time, since I just spent a couple hours looking for them and they were not up.
▲ Page top
FACTION
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2002 at 6:15 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
verant has designed it so that you cannot do the quest out of order. (or at least not too much) you need to have done most of the things before this part of the quest (except for maybe turning in all the swords to get teh corrupted GB in order for your faction to be high enough for it to work.
another important thing to note for you SKs who have never been to paineel. you need a key to get in so get a noob to do it for you. If you havent killed on odus before you will be kos inside fo the city even though you are evil. the guards will attack you but are only like lvl 30 or something. to raise faction so that the people near this guy wont start attacking you you need to kill a @#$#@ load of kobolds to raise heretics faction. just go to the warrens and run around the zone and kill everything you see. kill about 400-500 literally and then you can go in fine.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2002 at 7:46 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
is this guy always up or does he de spawn when ya hand in the piece and if he does how long of a respawn is he i tried doing this part tonight and he was not up neither was his brother or the guy in the tower bridge thingy out in the paineel noob area i feel verant was just having fun wasting me time

Kaggak
Lvl 54 Troll Shadowknight
▲ Page top
RE: Spawn time
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2004 at 6:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773556005
35 posts
this guy pops every 3 days, he is up only for a few hours or so at a time (talking about Marl) . One sure way to do it, is wait for a server patch or reset, wait 3 days after that patch and he will be up in Kerra Isle in one of the huts. After you do turn in he poofs.
▲ Page top
Questions
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 2:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247004216
3 posts
Where is Marl Kastane located? According to the quest, he is in Kerra Isle, but there is no listing anywhere for him.

Second question is how do you get into the city of Paineel past the locked rock?

Thanks

RE: Questions
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2002 at 7:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247629855
13 posts
To get past the locked rock, just find a newbie erudite, I'm sure he will be glad to open the elevator for you for a donation.

# Jan 12 2002 at 8:24 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Where is this guy located ?
▲ Page top
RE: PLZ help
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2002 at 4:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He is located in paineel. He does not spawn or despawn that I have seen, for he has always been there. Just as you exit the elevator follow the corridors through paineel... till you come to a door that opens to a grassy area, in this area there is a rind that looks exactly like a druid ring... he is located at the point of the ring closest to the door you just opened
